tEn: Once-for-All: Train One Network and Specialize it for Efficient Deployment
tZh: 一次训练，处处可用：训练一个网络，专用于高效部署
sEn: Train one network that supports diverse architectural settings and quickly specialize sub-networks for different devices without retraining.
sZh: 训练一个支持多种架构设置的网络，无需重新训练即可快速为不同设备定制子网络。
absEn: We address the challenging problem of efficient inference across many devices and resource constraints, especially on edge devices. Conventional approaches either manually design or use neural architecture search (NAS) to find a specialized neural network and train it from scratch for each case, which is computationally prohibitive (causing $CO_2$ emission as much as 5 cars' lifetime) thus unscalable. In this work, we propose to train a once-for-all (OFA) network that supports diverse architectural settings by decoupling training and search, to reduce the cost. We can quickly get a specialized sub-network by selecting from the OFA network without additional training. To efficiently train OFA networks, we also propose a novel progressive shrinking algorithm, a generalized pruning method that reduces the model size across many more dimensions than pruning (depth, width, kernel size, and resolution). It can obtain a surprisingly large number of sub-networks ($> 10^{19}$) that can fit different hardware platforms and latency constraints while maintaining the same level of accuracy as training independently. On diverse edge devices, OFA consistently outperforms state-of-the-art (SOTA) NAS methods (up to 4.0% ImageNet top1 accuracy improvement over MobileNetV3, or same accuracy but 1.5x faster than MobileNetV3, 2.6x faster than EfficientNet w.r.t measured latency) while reducing many orders of magnitude GPU hours and $CO_2$ emission. In particular, OFA achieves a new SOTA 80.0% ImageNet top-1 accuracy under the mobile setting ($<$600M MACs). OFA is the winning solution for the 3rd Low Power Computer Vision Challenge (LPCVC), DSP classification track and the 4th LPCVC, both classification track and detection track. Code and 50 pre-trained models (for many devices & many latency constraints) are released at https://github.com/mit-han-lab/once-for-all.
absZh: 我们解决了跨多种设备和资源约束（尤其是边缘设备）的高效推理这一难题。传统方法要么手动设计，要么使用神经架构搜索（NAS）为每种情况寻找专门的神经网络并从头训练，这在计算上代价高昂（产生的二氧化碳排放量相当于5辆汽车的终身排放），因此难以扩展。在这项工作中，我们提出通过解耦训练和搜索来训练一个一次训练（OFA）网络，该网络支持多种架构设置，从而降低成本。我们可以从OFA网络中快速选择一个专门的子网络，无需额外训练。为了高效训练OFA网络，我们还提出了一种新颖的渐进式收缩算法，这是一种通用的剪枝方法，可以在比剪枝更多的维度（深度、宽度、核大小和分辨率）上减小模型大小。它可以获得数量惊人的子网络（>10^19），这些子网络能够适应不同的硬件平台和延迟约束，同时保持与独立训练相同的准确率。在各种边缘设备上，OFA始终优于最先进的NAS方法（在ImageNet top1准确率上比MobileNetV3提升高达4.0%，或相同准确率但比MobileNetV3快1.5倍，比EfficientNet快2.6倍，以实测延迟计），同时减少了多个数量级的GPU时间和二氧化碳排放。特别是，OFA在移动设置（<600M MACs）下实现了新的最先进水平80.0%的ImageNet top-1准确率。OFA是第三届低功耗计算机视觉挑战赛（LPCVC）DSP分类赛道和第四届LPCVC分类赛道及检测赛道的获胜方案。代码和50个预训练模型（适用于多种设备和多种延迟约束）已在https://github.com/mit-han-lab/once-for-all 开源。

contrib.en: Proposes once-for-all (OFA) network decoupling training and search for efficient deployment across many devices.
contrib.zh: 提出一次性网络（OFA），将训练与搜索解耦，实现跨多种设备的高效部署。

contrib.en: Introduces progressive shrinking algorithm to train OFA network supporting over 10^19 sub-networks.
contrib.zh: 引入渐进式收缩算法训练OFA网络，支持超过10^19个子网络。

contrib.en: Achieves state-of-the-art 80.0% ImageNet top-1 accuracy under mobile setting (<600M MACs).
contrib.zh: 在移动设置（<600M MACs）下达到80.0%的ImageNet top-1准确率，创下新纪录。

contrib.en: Reduces GPU hours and CO2 emission by orders of magnitude compared to conventional NAS methods.
contrib.zh: 与传统NAS方法相比，将GPU小时和CO2排放量减少数个数量级。

contrib.en: Outperforms SOTA NAS methods on diverse edge devices with up to 4.0% accuracy gain or 2.6x speedup.
contrib.zh: 在多种边缘设备上优于最先进的NAS方法，准确率提升高达4.0%或速度提升2.6倍。

contrib.en: Wins 3rd and 4th Low Power Computer Vision Challenge (LPCVC) in classification and detection tracks.
contrib.zh: 在第三届和第四届低功耗计算机视觉挑战赛（LPCVC）的分类和检测赛道中获胜。

limits.en: OFA network training requires 1,200 GPU hours on V100 GPUs, a one-time cost.
limits.zh: OFA网络训练在V100 GPU上需要1200 GPU小时，这是一次性成本。

limits.en: Progressive shrinking algorithm may not generalize to non-CNN architectures like Transformers.
limits.zh: 渐进式收缩算法可能无法推广到非CNN架构，如Transformer。

limits.en: Accuracy predictor and latency lookup table require 16K sub-network samples for training.
limits.zh: 准确率预测器和延迟查找表需要16K子网络样本进行训练。

limits.en: OFA focuses on convolutional neural networks and may not apply to other model types.
limits.zh: OFA专注于卷积神经网络，可能不适用于其他模型类型。

limits.en: The method assumes hardware cost models are available and accurate for each target platform.
limits.zh: 该方法假设每个目标平台的硬件成本模型可用且准确。

items.en: We address the challenging problem of efficient inference across many devices and resource constraints, especially on edge devices. Conventional approaches either manually design or use neural architecture search (NAS) to find a specialized neural network and train it from scratch for each case, which is computationally prohibitive (causing C​O2𝐶subscript𝑂2CO_{2} emission as much as 5 cars’ lifetime Strubell et al. (2019)) thus unscalable. In this work, we propose to train a once-for-all (OFA) network that supports diverse architectural settings by decoupling training and search, to reduce the cost. We can quickly get a specialized sub-network by selecting from the OFA network without additional training. To efficiently train OFA networks, we also propose a novel progressive shrinking algorithm, a generalized pruning method that reduces the model size across many more dimensions than pruning (depth, width, kernel size, and resolution). It can obtain a surprisingly large number of sub-networks (>1019absentsuperscript1019>10^{19}) that can fit different hardware platforms and latency constraints while maintaining the same level of accuracy as training independently. On diverse edge devices, OFA consistently outperforms state-of-the-art (SOTA) NAS methods (up to 4.0% ImageNet top1 accuracy improvement over MobileNetV3, or same accuracy but 1.5×\times faster than MobileNetV3, 2.6×\times faster than EfficientNet w.r.t measured latency) while reducing many orders of magnitude GPU hours and C​O2𝐶subscript𝑂2CO_{2} emission. In particular, OFA achieves a new SOTA 80.0% ImageNet top-1 accuracy under the mobile setting (<<600M MACs). OFA is the winning solution for the 3rd Low Power Computer Vision Challenge (LPCVC), DSP classification track and the 4th LPCVC, both classification track and detection track. Code and 50 pre-trained models (for many devices & many latency constraints) are released at https://github.com/mit-han-lab/once-for-all.
items.zh: 我们解决了跨多种设备和资源约束（尤其是边缘设备）的高效推理这一挑战性问题。传统方法要么手动设计，要么使用神经架构搜索（NAS）为每种情况寻找专门的神经网络并从头训练，这在计算上代价高昂（导致CO₂排放量相当于5辆汽车全生命周期的排放量，Strubell等人，2019），因此不可扩展。在这项工作中，我们提出训练一个一次为所有（OFA）网络，通过解耦训练和搜索来支持多样化的架构设置，从而降低成本。我们可以通过从OFA网络中选择来快速获得专门的子网络，无需额外训练。为了高效训练OFA网络，我们还提出了一种新颖的渐进式收缩算法，这是一种广义剪枝方法，可在比剪枝更多的维度（深度、宽度、核大小和分辨率）上减小模型大小。它可以获得数量惊人的子网络（>10¹⁹），这些子网络能够适应不同的硬件平台和延迟约束，同时保持与独立训练相同的精度。在不同的边缘设备上，OFA始终优于最先进的NAS方法（在ImageNet top1精度上比MobileNetV3提升高达4.0%，或相同精度但比MobileNetV3快1.5倍，比EfficientNet快2.6倍，以实测延迟计），同时减少了多个数量级的GPU小时数和CO₂排放。特别是，OFA在移动设置（<600M MACs）下达到了新的SOTA 80.0% ImageNet top1精度。OFA是第三届低功耗计算机视觉挑战赛（LPCVC）DSP分类赛道和第四届LPCVC分类赛道及检测赛道的获胜方案。代码和50个预训练模型（适用于多种设备和多种延迟约束）已在https://github.com/mit-han-lab/once-for-all 发布。

items.en: Deep Neural Networks (DNNs) deliver state-of-the-art accuracy in many machine learning applications. However, the explosive growth in model size and computation cost gives rise to new challenges on how to efficiently deploy these deep learning models on diverse hardware platforms, since they have to meet different hardware efficiency constraints (e.g., latency, energy). For instance, one mobile application on App Store has to support a diverse range of hardware devices, from a high-end Samsung Note10 with a dedicated neural network accelerator to a 5-year-old Samsung S6 with a much slower processor. With different hardware resources (e.g., on-chip memory size, #arithmetic units), the optimal neural network architecture varies significantly. Even running on the same hardware, under different battery conditions or workloads, the best model architecture also differs a lot.
items.zh: 深度神经网络（DNN）在许多机器学习应用中提供了最先进的精度。然而，模型大小和计算成本的爆炸式增长带来了新的挑战：如何高效地将这些深度学习模型部署到多样化的硬件平台上，因为它们必须满足不同的硬件效率约束（例如延迟、能耗）。例如，App Store上的一个移动应用需要支持从配备专用神经网络加速器的高端三星Note10到处理器慢得多的5年前三星S6等多样化的硬件设备。由于硬件资源不同（例如片上存储器大小、算术单元数量），最优的神经网络架构差异很大。即使在相同硬件上运行，在不同的电池条件或工作负载下，最佳模型架构也大不相同。

items.capEn: Figure 1: Left: a single once-for-all network is trained to support versatile architectural configurations including depth, width, kernel size, and resolution. Given a deployment scenario, a specialized sub-network is directly selected from the once-for-all network without training. Middle: this approach reduces the cost of specialized deep learning deployment from O(N) to O(1). Right: once-for-all network followed by model selection can derive many accuracy-latency trade-offs by training only once, compared to conventional methods that require repeated training.
items.capZh: 图1：左：训练单个一次为所有网络以支持多种架构配置，包括深度、宽度、核大小和分辨率。给定部署场景，直接从一次为所有网络中选择专门的子网络，无需训练。中：这种方法将专门深度学习部署的成本从O(N)降低到O(1)。右：一次为所有网络后接模型选择，只需训练一次即可推导出多个精度-延迟权衡，而传统方法需要重复训练。

items.en: Given different hardware platforms and efficiency constraints (defined as deployment scenarios), researchers either design compact models specialized for mobile (Howard et al., 2017; Sandler et al., 2018; Zhang et al., 2018) or accelerate the existing models by compression (Han et al., 2016; He et al., 2018) for efficient deployment. However, designing specialized DNNs for every scenario is engineer-expensive and computationally expensive, either with human-based methods or NAS. Since such methods need to repeat the network design process and retrain the designed network from scratch for each case. Their total cost grows linearly as the number of deployment scenarios increases, which will result in excessive energy consumption and C​O2𝐶subscript𝑂2CO_{2} emission (Strubell et al., 2019). It makes them unable to handle the vast amount of hardware devices (23.14 billion IoT devices till 2018111https://www.statista.com/statistics/471264/iot-number-of-connected-devices-worldwide/) and highly dynamic deployment environments (different battery conditions, different latency requirements, etc.).
items.zh: 针对不同的硬件平台和效率约束（定义为部署场景），研究人员要么设计专门用于移动设备的紧凑模型（Howard等人，2017；Sandler等人，2018；Zhang等人，2018），要么通过压缩加速现有模型（Han等人，2016；He等人，2018）以实现高效部署。然而，为每种场景设计专门的DNN，无论是基于人工方法还是NAS，都既耗费工程又计算昂贵。因为这类方法需要重复网络设计过程，并为每种情况从头重新训练设计的网络。它们的总成本随着部署场景数量的增加而线性增长，这将导致过度的能耗和CO₂排放（Strubell等人，2019）。这使得它们无法处理大量的硬件设备（截至2018年有231.4亿个物联网设备¹）和高度动态的部署环境（不同的电池条件、不同的延迟要求等）。

items.en: This paper introduces a new solution to tackle this challenge – designing a once-for-all network that can be directly deployed under diverse architectural configurations, amortizing the training cost. The inference is performed by selecting only part of the once-for-all network. It flexibly supports different depths, widths, kernel sizes, and resolutions without retraining. A simple example of Once-for-All (OFA) is illustrated in Figure 1 (left). Specifically, we decouple the model training stage and the neural architecture search stage. In the model training stage, we focus on improving the accuracy of all sub-networks that are derived by selecting different parts of the once-for-all network. In the model specialization stage, we sample a subset of sub-networks to train an accuracy predictor and latency predictors. Given the target hardware and constraint, a predictor-guided architecture search (Liu et al., 2018) is conducted to get a specialized sub-network, and the cost is negligible. As such, we reduce the total cost of specialized neural network design from O(N) to O(1) (Figure 1 middle).
items.zh: 本文介绍了一种解决这一挑战的新方案——设计一个一次为所有网络，可以直接在多种架构配置下部署，从而分摊训练成本。推理通过仅选择一次为所有网络的一部分来执行。它灵活地支持不同的深度、宽度、核大小和分辨率，无需重新训练。图1（左）展示了一个简单的OFA示例。具体来说，我们将模型训练阶段和神经架构搜索阶段解耦。在模型训练阶段，我们专注于提高所有子网络的精度，这些子网络通过选择一次为所有网络的不同部分得到。在模型专门化阶段，我们采样一个子网络子集来训练精度预测器和延迟预测器。给定目标硬件和约束，进行预测器引导的架构搜索（Liu等人，2018）以获得专门的子网络，且成本可忽略不计。这样，我们将专门神经网络设计的总成本从O(N)降低到O(1)（图1中）。

items.en: However, training the once-for-all network is a non-trivial task, since it requires joint optimization of the weights to maintain the accuracy of a large number of sub-networks (more than 1019 in our experiments). It is computationally prohibitive to enumerate all sub-networks to get the exact gradient in each update step, while randomly sampling a few sub-networks in each step will lead to significant accuracy drops. The challenge is that different sub-networks are interfering with each other, making the training process of the whole once-for-all network inefficient. To address this challenge, we propose a progressive shrinking algorithm for training the once-for-all network. Instead of directly optimizing the once-for-all network from scratch, we propose to first train the largest neural network with maximum depth, width, and kernel size, then progressively fine-tune the once-for-all network to support smaller sub-networks that share weights with the larger ones. As such, it provides better initialization by selecting the most important weights of larger sub-networks, and the opportunity to distill smaller sub-networks, which greatly improves the training efficiency. From this perspective, progressive shrinking can be viewed as a generalized network pruning method that shrinks multiple dimensions (depth, width, kernel size, and resolution) of the full network rather than only the width dimension. Besides, it targets on maintaining the accuracy of all sub-networks rather than a single pruned network.
items.zh: 然而，训练一次为所有网络是一项艰巨的任务，因为它需要联合优化权重以维持大量子网络（在我们的实验中超过10¹⁹个）的精度。在每次更新步骤中枚举所有子网络以获得精确梯度在计算上代价高昂，而每次随机采样少数子网络会导致显著的精度下降。挑战在于不同的子网络相互干扰，使得整个一次为所有网络的训练过程效率低下。为了应对这一挑战，我们提出了一种用于训练一次为所有网络的渐进式收缩算法。我们不是从头直接优化一次为所有网络，而是建议首先训练具有最大深度、宽度和核大小的最大神经网络，然后逐步微调一次为所有网络以支持与较大子网络共享权重的较小子网络。这样，通过选择较大子网络的最重要权重提供了更好的初始化，并提供了蒸馏较小子网络的机会，从而大大提高了训练效率。从这个角度来看，渐进式收缩可以看作是一种广义的网络剪枝方法，它缩减完整网络的多个维度（深度、宽度、核大小和分辨率），而不仅仅是宽度维度。此外，它的目标是维持所有子网络的精度，而不是单个剪枝网络。

items.en: We extensively evaluated the effectiveness of OFA on ImageNet with many hardware platforms (CPU, GPU, mCPU, mGPU, FPGA accelerator) and efficiency constraints. Under all deployment scenarios, OFA consistently improves the ImageNet accuracy by a significant margin compared to SOTA hardware-aware NAS methods while saving the GPU hours, dollars, and C​O2𝐶subscript𝑂2CO_{2} emission by orders of magnitude. On the ImageNet mobile setting (less than 600M MACs), OFA achieves a new SOTA 80.0% top1 accuracy with 595M MACs (Figure 2). To the best of our knowledge, this is the first time that the SOTA ImageNet top1 accuracy reaches 80% under the mobile setting.
items.zh: 我们在ImageNet上使用多种硬件平台（CPU、GPU、移动CPU、移动GPU、FPGA加速器）和效率约束，广泛评估了OFA的有效性。在所有部署场景下，与最先进的硬件感知NAS方法相比，OFA始终显著提高ImageNet精度，同时将GPU小时数、成本和CO₂排放量减少了多个数量级。在ImageNet移动设置（小于600M MACs）下，OFA以595M MACs实现了新的SOTA 80.0% top1精度（图2）。据我们所知，这是移动设置下ImageNet top1精度首次达到80%。

items.capEn: Figure 2: Comparison between OFA and state-of-the-art CNN models on ImageNet. OFA provides 80.0% ImageNet top1 accuracy under the mobile setting (<< 600M MACs).
items.capZh: 图2：OFA与最先进的CNN模型在ImageNet上的比较。OFA在移动设置（<600M MACs）下提供80.0% ImageNet top1精度。

items.en: Many efficient neural network architectures are proposed to improve the hardware efficiency, such as SqueezeNet (Iandola et al., 2016), MobileNets (Howard et al., 2017; Sandler et al., 2018), ShuffleNets (Ma et al., 2018; Zhang et al., 2018), etc. Orthogonal to architecting efficient neural networks, model compression (Han et al., 2016) is another very effective technique for efficient deep learning, including network pruning that removes redundant units (Han et al., 2015) or redundant channels (He et al., 2018; Liu et al., 2017), and quantization that reduces the bit width for the weights and activations (Han et al., 2016; Courbariaux et al., 2015; Zhu et al., 2017).
items.zh: 许多高效的神经网络架构被提出以提高硬件效率，例如SqueezeNet（Iandola等人，2016）、MobileNets（Howard等人，2017；Sandler等人，2018）、ShuffleNets（Ma等人，2018；Zhang等人，2018）等。与设计高效神经网络正交，模型压缩（Han等人，2016）是另一种非常有效的深度学习高效技术，包括移除冗余单元（Han等人，2015）或冗余通道（He等人，2018；Liu等人，2017）的网络剪枝，以及减少权重和激活位宽的量化（Han等人，2016；Courbariaux等人，2015；Zhu等人，2017）。

items.en: Neural architecture search (NAS) focuses on automating the architecture design process (Zoph & Le, 2017; Zoph et al., 2018; Real et al., 2019; Cai et al., 2018a; Liu et al., 2019). Early NAS methods (Zoph et al., 2018; Real et al., 2019; Cai et al., 2018b) search for high-accuracy architectures without taking hardware efficiency into consideration. Therefore, the produced architectures (e.g., NASNet, AmoebaNet) are not efficient for inference. Recent hardware-aware NAS methods (Cai et al., 2019; Tan et al., 2019; Wu et al., 2019) directly incorporate the hardware feedback into architecture search. Hardware-DNN co-design techniques (Jiang et al., 2019b; a; Hao et al., 2019) jointly optimize neural network architectures and hardware architectures. As a result, they can improve inference efficiency. However, given new inference hardware platforms, these methods need to repeat the architecture search process and retrain the model, leading to prohibitive GPU hours, dollars, and C​O2𝐶subscript𝑂2CO_{2} emission. They are not scalable to a large number of deployment scenarios. The individually trained models do not share any weight, leading to large total model size and high downloading bandwidth.
items.zh: 神经架构搜索（NAS）专注于自动化架构设计过程（Zoph & Le，2017；Zoph等人，2018；Real等人，2019；Cai等人，2018a；Liu等人，2019）。早期的NAS方法（Zoph等人，2018；Real等人，2019；Cai等人，2018b）搜索高精度架构而不考虑硬件效率。因此，产生的架构（例如NASNet、AmoebaNet）推理效率不高。最近的硬件感知NAS方法（Cai等人，2019；Tan等人，2019；Wu等人，2019）直接将硬件反馈纳入架构搜索。硬件-DNN协同设计技术（Jiang等人，2019b；a；Hao等人，2019）联合优化神经网络架构和硬件架构。因此，它们可以提高推理效率。然而，面对新的推理硬件平台，这些方法需要重复架构搜索过程并重新训练模型，导致高昂的GPU小时数、成本和CO₂排放。它们无法扩展到大量部署场景。单独训练的模型不共享任何权重，导致总模型大小大、下载带宽高。

items.en: To improve the efficiency of a given neural network, some work explored skipping part of the model based on the input image. For example, Wu et al. (2018); Liu & Deng (2018); Wang et al. (2018) learn a controller or gating modules to adaptively drop layers; Huang et al. (2018) introduce early-exit branches in the computation graph; Lin et al. (2017) adaptively prune channels based on the input feature map; Kuen et al. (2018) introduce stochastic downsampling point to reduce the feature map size adaptively. Recently, Slimmable Nets (Yu et al., 2019; Yu & Huang, 2019b) propose to train a model to support multiple width multipliers (e.g., 4 different global width multipliers), building upon existing human-designed neural networks (e.g., MobileNetV2 0.35, 0.5, 0.75, 1.0). Such methods can adaptively fit different efficiency constraints at runtime, however, still inherit a pre-designed neural network (e.g., MobileNet-v2), which limits the degree of flexibility (e.g., only width multiplier can adapt) and the ability in handling new deployment scenarios where the pre-designed neural network is not optimal. In this work, in contrast, we enable a much more diverse architecture space (depth, width, kernel size, and resolution) and a significantly larger number of architectural settings (1019superscript101910^{19} v.s. 4 (Yu et al., 2019)). Thanks to the diversity and the large design space, we can derive new specialized neural networks for many different deployment scenarios rather than working on top of an existing neural network that limits the optimization headroom. However, it is more challenging to train the network to achieve this flexibility, which motivates us to design the progressive shrinking algorithm to tackle this challenge.
items.zh: 为了提高给定神经网络的效率，一些工作探索了基于输入图像跳过部分模型。例如，Wu等人（2018）；Liu & Deng（2018）；Wang等人（2018）学习控制器或门控模块来自适应地丢弃层；Huang等人（2018）在计算图中引入早期退出分支；Lin等人（2017）基于输入特征图自适应地剪枝通道；Kuen等人（2018）引入随机下采样点来自适应地减小特征图大小。最近，Slimmable Nets（Yu等人，2019；Yu & Huang，2019b）提出训练一个模型以支持多个宽度乘数（例如4个不同的全局宽度乘数），建立在现有手工设计的神经网络（例如MobileNetV2 0.35、0.5、0.75、1.0）之上。这类方法可以在运行时自适应地适应不同的效率约束，但仍然继承了预先设计的神经网络（例如MobileNet-v2），这限制了灵活性程度（例如只有宽度乘数可以适应）以及处理新部署场景的能力，在这些场景中预先设计的神经网络不是最优的。相比之下，在这项工作中，我们实现了更加多样化的架构空间（深度、宽度、核大小和分辨率）以及显著更多的架构设置数量（10¹⁹ vs. 4（Yu等人，2019））。得益于多样性和大的设计空间，我们可以为许多不同的部署场景推导出新的专门神经网络，而不是在限制优化空间的现有神经网络基础上工作。然而，训练网络以实现这种灵活性更具挑战性，这促使我们设计渐进式收缩算法来应对这一挑战。

items.en: Assuming the weights of the once-for-all network as Wosubscript𝑊𝑜W_{o} and the architectural configurations as {a​r​c​hi}𝑎𝑟𝑐subscriptℎ𝑖\{arch_{i}\}, we then can formalize the problem as
items.zh: 假设一次为所有网络的权重为W_o，架构配置为{arch_i}，那么我们可以将问题形式化为：

items.en: where C​(Wo,a​r​c​hi)𝐶subscript𝑊𝑜𝑎𝑟𝑐subscriptℎ𝑖C(W_{o},arch_{i}) denotes a selection scheme that selects part of the model from the once-for-all network Wosubscript𝑊𝑜W_{o} to form a sub-network with architectural configuration a​r​c​hi𝑎𝑟𝑐subscriptℎ𝑖arch_{i}. The overall training objective is to optimize Wosubscript𝑊𝑜W_{o} to make each supported sub-network maintain the same level of accuracy as independently training a network with the same architectural configuration.
items.zh: 其中C(W_o, arch_i)表示一种选择方案，从一次为所有网络W_o中选择部分模型以形成具有架构配置arch_i的子网络。整体训练目标是优化W_o，使得每个支持的子网络保持与独立训练相同架构配置的网络相同的精度水平。

items.en: Our once-for-all network provides one model but supports many sub-networks of different sizes, covering four important dimensions of the convolutional neural networks (CNNs) architectures, i.e., depth, width, kernel size, and resolution. Following the common practice of many CNN models (He et al., 2016; Sandler et al., 2018; Huang et al., 2017), we divide a CNN model into a sequence of units with gradually reduced feature map size and increased channel numbers. Each unit consists of a sequence of layers where only the first layer has stride 2 if the feature map size decreases (Sandler et al., 2018). All the other layers in the units have stride 1.
items.zh: 我们的一次为所有网络提供一个模型，但支持许多不同大小的子网络，涵盖卷积神经网络（CNN）架构的四个重要维度，即深度、宽度、核大小和分辨率。遵循许多CNN模型的常见做法（He等人，2016；Sandler等人，2018；Huang等人，2017），我们将CNN模型划分为一系列单元，这些单元的特征图大小逐渐减小，通道数逐渐增加。每个单元由一系列层组成，其中仅当特征图大小减小时第一层的步长为2（Sandler等人，2018）。单元中的所有其他层步长为1。

items.en: We allow each unit to use arbitrary numbers of layers (denoted as elastic depth); For each layer, we allow to use arbitrary numbers of channels (denoted as elastic width) and arbitrary kernel sizes (denoted as elastic kernel size). In addition, we also allow the CNN model to take arbitrary input image sizes (denoted as elastic resolution). For example, in our experiments, the input image size ranges from 128 to 224 with a stride 4; the depth of each unit is chosen from {2, 3, 4}; the width expansion ratio in each layer is chosen from {3, 4, 6}; the kernel size is chosen from {3, 5, 7}. Therefore, with 5 units, we have roughly ((3×3)2+(3×3)3+(3×3)4)5≈2×1019superscriptsuperscript332superscript333superscript33452superscript1019((3\times 3)^{2}+(3\times 3)^{3}+(3\times 3)^{4})^{5}\approx 2\times 10^{19} different neural network architectures and each of them can be used under 25 different input resolutions. Since all of these sub-networks share the same weights (i.e., Wosubscript𝑊𝑜W_{o}) (Cheung et al., 2019), we only require 7.7M parameters to store all of them. Without sharing, the total model size will be prohibitive.
items.zh: 我们允许每个单元使用任意数量的层（称为弹性深度）；对于每一层，我们允许使用任意数量的通道（称为弹性宽度）和任意核大小（称为弹性核大小）。此外，我们还允许CNN模型接受任意输入图像大小（称为弹性分辨率）。例如，在我们的实验中，输入图像大小从128到224，步长为4；每个单元的深度从{2, 3, 4}中选择；每层的宽度扩展比从{3, 4, 6}中选择；核大小从{3, 5, 7}中选择。因此，对于5个单元，我们大约有((3×3)²+(3×3)³+(3×3)⁴)⁵≈2×10¹⁹种不同的神经网络架构，每种架构可以在25种不同的输入分辨率下使用。由于所有这些子网络共享相同的权重（即W_o）（Cheung等人，2019），我们只需要7.7M参数来存储它们。如果不共享，总模型大小将是巨大的。

items.capEn: Figure 3: Illustration of the progressive shrinking process to support different depth D𝐷D, width W𝑊W, kernel size K𝐾K and resolution R𝑅R. It leads to a large space comprising diverse sub-networks (>1019absentsuperscript1019>10^{19}).
items.capZh: 图3：渐进式收缩过程示意图，支持不同的深度D、宽度W、核大小K和分辨率R。它产生了一个包含多样子网络（>10¹⁹）的大空间。

items.capEn: Figure 4: Progressive shrinking can be viewed as a generalized network pruning technique with much higher flexibility. Compared to network pruning, it shrinks more dimensions (not only width) and provides a much more powerful once-for-all network that can fit different deployment scenarios rather than a single pruned network.
items.capZh: 图4：渐进式收缩可以看作是一种具有更高灵活性的广义网络剪枝技术。与网络剪枝相比，它缩减了更多维度（不仅仅是宽度），并提供了一个更强大的一次为所有网络，可以适应不同的部署场景，而不是单个剪枝网络。

items.en: Training the once-for-all network can be cast as a multi-objective problem, where each objective corresponds to one sub-network. From this perspective, a naïve training approach is to directly optimize the once-for-all network from scratch using the exact gradient of the overall objective, which is derived by enumerating all sub-networks in each update step, as shown in Eq. (1). The cost of this approach is linear to the number of sub-networks. Therefore, it is only applicable to scenarios where a limited number of sub-networks are supported (Yu et al., 2019), while in our case, it is computationally prohibitive to adopt this approach.
items.zh: 训练一次为所有网络可以看作是一个多目标问题，其中每个目标对应一个子网络。从这个角度来看，一种朴素的训练方法是使用整体目标的精确梯度从头直接优化一次为所有网络，该梯度通过在每次更新步骤中枚举所有子网络得到，如公式（1）所示。这种方法的成本与子网络数量成线性关系。因此，它仅适用于支持有限数量子网络的场景（Yu等人，2019），而在我们的情况下，采用这种方法在计算上是不可行的。

items.en: Another naïve training approach is to sample a few sub-networks in each update step rather than enumerate all of them, which does not have the issue of prohibitive cost. However, with such a large number of sub-networks that share weights, thus interfere with each other, we find it suffers from significant accuracy drop. In the following section, we introduce a solution to address this challenge, i.e., progressive shrinking.
items.zh: 另一种朴素的训练方法是在每次更新步骤中采样少数子网络而不是枚举所有子网络，这没有成本过高的问题。然而，由于如此大量的子网络共享权重，因此相互干扰，我们发现这种方法遭受显著的精度下降。在下一节中，我们介绍一种解决这一挑战的方案，即渐进式收缩。

items.en: The once-for-all network comprises many sub-networks of different sizes where small sub-networks are nested in large sub-networks. To prevent interference between the sub-networks, we propose to enforce a training order from large sub-networks to small sub-networks in a progressive manner. We name this training scheme as progressive shrinking (PS). An example of the training process with PS is provided in Figure 3 and Figure 4, where we start with training the largest neural network with the maximum kernel size (e.g., 7), depth (e.g., 4), and width (e.g., 6). Next, we progressively fine-tune the network to support smaller sub-networks by gradually adding them into the sampling space (larger sub-networks may also be sampled). Specifically, after training the largest network, we first support elastic kernel size which can choose from {3, 5, 7} at each layer, while the depth and width remain the maximum values. Then, we support elastic depth and elastic width sequentially, as is shown in Figure 3. The resolution is elastic throughout the whole training process, which is implemented by sampling different image sizes for each batch of training data. We also use the knowledge distillation technique after training the largest neural network (Hinton et al., 2015; Ashok et al., 2018; Yu & Huang, 2019b). It combines two loss terms using both the soft labels given by the largest neural network and the real labels.
items.zh: 一次为所有网络包含许多不同大小的子网络，其中小子网络嵌套在大子网络中。为了防止子网络之间的干扰，我们建议以渐进方式强制执行从大子网络到小子网络的训练顺序。我们将这种训练方案命名为渐进式收缩（PS）。图3和图4提供了使用PS的训练过程示例，我们从训练具有最大核大小（例如7）、深度（例如4）和宽度（例如6）的最大神经网络开始。接下来，我们逐步微调网络以支持较小子网络，通过逐渐将它们添加到采样空间中（较大的子网络也可能被采样）。具体来说，在训练最大网络之后，我们首先支持弹性核大小，它可以在每一层从{3, 5, 7}中选择，而深度和宽度保持最大值。然后，我们依次支持弹性深度和弹性宽度，如图3所示。在整个训练过程中，分辨率是弹性的，通过为每批训练数据采样不同的图像大小来实现。在训练最大神经网络之后，我们还使用知识蒸馏技术（Hinton等人，2015；Ashok等人，2018；Yu & Huang，2019b）。它结合了两个损失项，分别使用最大神经网络给出的软标签和真实标签。

items.en: Compared to the naïve approach, PS prevents small sub-networks from interfering large sub-networks, since large sub-networks are already well-trained when the once-for-all network is fine-tuned to support small sub-networks. Regarding the small sub-networks, they share the weights with the large ones. Therefore, PS allows initializing small sub-networks with the most important weights of well-trained large sub-networks, which expedites the training process. Compared to network pruning (Figure 4), PS also starts with training the full model, but it shrinks not only the width dimension but also the depth, kernel size, and resolution dimensions of the full model. Additionally, PS fine-tunes both large and small sub-networks rather than a single pruned network. As a result, PS provides a much more powerful once-for-all network that can fit diverse hardware platforms and efficiency constraints compared to network pruning. We describe the details of the PS training flow as follows:
items.zh: 与朴素方法相比，PS防止小子网络干扰大子网络，因为在一次性网络微调以支持小子网络时，大子网络已经训练良好。对于小子网络，它们与大子网络共享权重。因此，PS允许用训练好的大子网络的最重要权重初始化小子网络，从而加速训练过程。与网络剪枝（图4）相比，PS也从训练完整模型开始，但它不仅缩小完整模型的宽度维度，还缩小深度、卷积核大小和分辨率维度。此外，PS同时微调大子网络和小子网络，而不是单个剪枝网络。因此，与网络剪枝相比，PS提供了更强大的一次性网络，能够适应多样化的硬件平台和效率约束。我们如下描述PS训练流程的细节：

items.capEn: Figure 5: Left: Kernel transformation matrix for elastic kernel size. Right: Progressive shrinking for elastic depth. Instead of skipping each layer independently, we keep the first D𝐷D layers and skip the last (4−D)4𝐷(4-D) layers. The weights of the early layers are shared.
items.capZh: 图5：左：弹性卷积核大小的核变换矩阵。右：弹性深度的渐进式收缩。不是独立地跳过每一层，而是保留前D层并跳过最后(4-D)层。早期层的权重是共享的。

items.capEn: Figure 6: Progressive shrinking for elastic width. In this example, we progressively support 4, 3, and 2 channel settings. We perform channel sorting and pick the most important channels (with large L1 norm) to initialize the smaller channel settings. The important channels’ weights are shared.
items.capZh: 图6：弹性宽度的渐进式收缩。在此示例中，我们逐步支持4、3和2通道设置。我们执行通道排序并选择最重要的通道（具有较大L1范数）来初始化较小的通道设置。重要通道的权重是共享的。

items.en: Elastic Kernel Size (Figure 5 left). We let the center of a 7x7 convolution kernel also serve as a 5x5 kernel, the center of which can also be a 3x3 kernel. Therefore, the kernel size becomes elastic. The challenge is that the centering sub-kernels (e.g., 3x3 and 5x5) are shared and need to play multiple roles (independent kernel and part of a large kernel). The weights of centered sub-kernels may need to have different distribution or magnitude as different roles. Forcing them to be the same degrades the performance of some sub-networks. Therefore, we introduce kernel transformation matrices when sharing the kernel weights. We use separate kernel transformation matrices for different layers. Within each layer, the kernel transformation matrices are shared among different channels. As such, we only need 25×25+9×9=70625259970625\times 25+9\times 9=706 extra parameters to store the kernel transformation matrices in each layer, which is negligible.
items.zh: 弹性卷积核大小（图5左）。我们让7x7卷积核的中心也充当5x5卷积核，其中心也可以作为3x3卷积核。因此，卷积核大小变得弹性。挑战在于居中的子卷积核（例如3x3和5x5）是共享的，并且需要扮演多个角色（独立卷积核和大卷积核的一部分）。居中的子卷积核的权重可能需要根据不同的角色具有不同的分布或幅度。强制它们相同会降低某些子网络的性能。因此，我们在共享卷积核权重时引入核变换矩阵。我们对不同层使用独立的核变换矩阵。在每一层内，核变换矩阵在不同通道之间共享。这样，我们每层只需要25×25+9×9=706个额外参数来存储核变换矩阵，这是可以忽略的。

items.en: Elastic Depth (Figure 5 right). To derive a sub-network that has D𝐷D layers in a unit that originally has N𝑁N layers, we keep the first D layers and skip the last N−D𝑁𝐷N-D layers, rather than keeping any D𝐷D layers as done in current NAS methods (Cai et al., 2019; Wu et al., 2019). As such, one depth setting only corresponds to one combination of layers. In the end, the weights of the first D layers are shared between large and small models.
items.zh: 弹性深度（图5右）。为了在原本有N层的单元中导出具有D层的子网络，我们保留前D层并跳过最后N-D层，而不是像当前NAS方法（Cai等人，2019；Wu等人，2019）那样保留任意D层。这样，一个深度设置只对应一种层组合。最终，前D层的权重在大模型和小模型之间共享。

items.en: Elastic Width (Figure 6). Width means the number of channels. We give each layer the flexibility to choose different channel expansion ratios. Following the progressive shrinking scheme, we first train a full-width model. Then we introduce a channel sorting operation to support partial widths. It reorganizes the channels according to their importance, which is calculated based on the L1 norm of a channel’s weight. Larger L1 norm means more important. For example, when shrinking from a 4-channel-layer to a 3-channel-layer, we select the largest 3 channels, whose weights are shared with the 4-channel-layer (Figure 6 left and middle). Thereby, smaller sub-networks are initialized with the most important channels on the once-for-all network which is already well trained. This channel sorting operation preserves the accuracy of larger sub-networks.
items.zh: 弹性宽度（图6）。宽度指通道数。我们给每一层选择不同通道扩展比例的灵活性。遵循渐进式收缩方案，我们首先训练全宽度模型。然后引入通道排序操作以支持部分宽度。它根据通道的重要性重新组织通道，重要性基于通道权重的L1范数计算。L1范数越大表示越重要。例如，当从4通道层收缩到3通道层时，我们选择最大的3个通道，其权重与4通道层共享（图6左和中）。因此，较小的子网络用已经训练好的一次性网络上最重要的通道初始化。这种通道排序操作保留了大子网络的准确性。

full.sec: 3.4 Specialized Model Deployment with Once-for-all Network
full.secZh: 3.4 使用一次性网络部署专用模型

items.en: Having trained a once-for-all network, the next stage is to derive the specialized sub-network for a given deployment scenario. The goal is to search for a neural network that satisfies the efficiency (e.g., latency, energy) constraints on the target hardware while optimizing the accuracy. Since OFA decouples model training from neural architecture search, we do not need any training cost in this stage. Furthermore, we build neural-network-twins to predict the latency and accuracy given a neural network architecture, providing a quick feedback for model quality. It eliminates the repeated search cost by substituting the measured accuracy/latency with predicted accuracy/latency (twins).
items.zh: 训练好一次性网络后，下一阶段是为给定的部署场景导出专门的子网络。目标是搜索一个满足目标硬件效率（例如延迟、能耗）约束同时优化准确性的神经网络。由于OFA将模型训练与神经架构搜索解耦，我们在这一阶段不需要任何训练成本。此外，我们构建神经网络孪生模型来预测给定神经网络架构的延迟和准确性，为模型质量提供快速反馈。它通过用预测的准确性/延迟（孪生模型）替代测量的准确性/延迟，消除了重复的搜索成本。

items.en: Specifically, we randomly sample 16K sub-networks with different architectures and input image sizes, then measure their accuracy on 10K validation images sampled from the original training set. These [architecture, accuracy] pairs are used to train an accuracy predictor to predict the accuracy of a model given its architecture and input image size222Details of the accuracy predictor is provided in Appendix A.. We also build a latency lookup table (Cai et al., 2019) on each target hardware platform to predict the latency. Given the target hardware and latency constraint, we conduct an evolutionary search (Real et al., 2019) based on the neural-network-twins to get a specialized sub-network. Since the cost of searching with neural-network-twins is negligible, we only need 40 GPU hours to collect the data pairs, and the cost stays constant regardless of #deployment scenarios.
items.zh: 具体来说，我们随机采样16K个具有不同架构和输入图像大小的子网络，然后在从原始训练集中采样的10K验证图像上测量它们的准确性。这些[架构，准确性]对用于训练准确性预测器，以根据给定架构和输入图像大小预测模型的准确性222准确性预测器的细节见附录A。我们还在每个目标硬件平台上构建延迟查找表（Cai等人，2019）以预测延迟。给定目标硬件和延迟约束，我们基于神经网络孪生模型进行进化搜索（Real等人，2019）以获得专门的子网络。由于使用神经网络孪生模型搜索的成本可以忽略，我们只需要40 GPU小时来收集数据对，并且成本保持恒定，与部署场景数量无关。

items.capEn: Figure 7: ImageNet top1 accuracy (%) performances of sub-networks under resolution 224×224224224224\times 224. “(D = d𝑑d, W = w𝑤w, K = k𝑘k)” denotes a sub-network with d𝑑d layers in each unit, and each layer has an width expansion ratio w𝑤w and kernel size k𝑘k.
items.capZh: 图7：分辨率224×224下子网络的ImageNet top1准确率（%）。“(D = d, W = w, K = k)”表示每个单元有d层、每层宽度扩展比为w、卷积核大小为k的子网络。

items.en: In this section, we first apply the progressive shrinking algorithm to train the once-for-all network on ImageNet (Deng et al., 2009). Then we demonstrate the effectiveness of our trained once-for-all network on various hardware platforms (Samsung S7 Edge, Note8, Note10, Google Pixel1, Pixel2, LG G8, NVIDIA 1080Ti, V100 GPUs, Jetson TX2, Intel Xeon CPU, Xilinx ZU9EG, and ZU3EG FPGAs) with different latency constraints.
items.zh: 在本节中，我们首先应用渐进式收缩算法在ImageNet（Deng等人，2009）上训练一次性网络。然后，我们展示训练好的一次性网络在各种硬件平台（Samsung S7 Edge、Note8、Note10、Google Pixel1、Pixel2、LG G8、NVIDIA 1080Ti、V100 GPU、Jetson TX2、Intel Xeon CPU、Xilinx ZU9EG和ZU3EG FPGA）上具有不同延迟约束的有效性。

full.sec: 4.1 Training the Once-for-all Network on ImageNet

items.en: We use the same architecture space as MobileNetV3 (Howard et al., 2019). For training the full network, we use the standard SGD optimizer with Nesterov momentum 0.9 and weight decay 3​e−53superscript𝑒53e^{-5}. The initial learning rate is 2.6, and we use the cosine schedule (Loshchilov & Hutter, 2016) for learning rate decay. The full network is trained for 180 epochs with batch size 2048 on 32 GPUs. Then we follow the schedule described in Figure 3 to further fine-tune the full network333Implementation details can be found in Appendix B.. The whole training process takes around 1,200 GPU hours on V100 GPUs. This is a one-time training cost that can be amortized by many deployment scenarios.
items.zh: 我们使用与MobileNetV3（Howard等人，2019）相同的架构空间。对于完整网络的训练，我们使用标准SGD优化器，Nesterov动量0.9，权重衰减3e-5。初始学习率为2.6，并使用余弦调度（Loshchilov & Hutter, 2016）进行学习率衰减。完整网络在32个GPU上以2048的批量大小训练180个epoch。然后我们按照图3中描述的调度进一步微调完整网络333实现细节见附录B。整个训练过程在V100 GPU上大约需要1,200 GPU小时。这是一次性训练成本，可以被许多部署场景分摊。

full.sec: 4.2 Specialized Sub-networks for Different Hardware and Constraints
full.secZh: 4.2 针对不同硬件和约束的专用子网络

items.en: We apply our trained once-for-all network to get different specialized sub-networks for diverse hardware platforms: from the cloud to the edge. On cloud devices, the latency for GPU is measured with batch size 64 on NVIDIA 1080Ti and V100 with Pytorch 1.0+cuDNN. The CPU latency is measured with batch size 1 on Intel Xeon E5-2690 v4+MKL-DNN. On edge devices, including mobile phones, we use Samsung, Google and LG phones with TF-Lite, batch size 1; for mobile GPU, we use Jetson TX2 with Pytorch 1.0+cuDNN, batch size of 16; for embedded FPGA, we use Xilinx ZU9EG and ZU3EG FPGAs with Vitis AI444https://www.xilinx.com/products/design-tools/vitis/vitis-ai.html, batch size 1.
items.zh: 我们应用训练好的一次性网络为不同的硬件平台（从云到边缘）获取不同的专门子网络。在云设备上，GPU延迟在NVIDIA 1080Ti和V100上使用Pytorch 1.0+cuDNN以批量大小64测量。CPU延迟在Intel Xeon E5-2690 v4+MKL-DNN上以批量大小1测量。在边缘设备上，包括手机，我们使用Samsung、Google和LG手机，TF-Lite，批量大小1；对于移动GPU，我们使用Jetson TX2，Pytorch 1.0+cuDNN，批量大小16；对于嵌入式FPGA，我们使用Xilinx ZU9EG和ZU3EG FPGA，Vitis AI444https://www.xilinx.com/products/design-tools/vitis/vitis-ai.html，批量大小1。

items.capEn: Figure 8: OFA saves orders of magnitude design cost compared to NAS methods.
items.capZh: 图8：与NAS方法相比，OFA节省了数量级的设计成本。

items.capEn: Figure 9: OFA achieves 80.0% top1 accuracy with 595M MACs and 80.1% top1 accuracy with 143ms Pixel1 latency, setting a new SOTA ImageNet top1 accuracy on the mobile setting.
items.capZh: 图9：OFA在595M MACs下达到80.0% top1准确率，在143ms Pixel1延迟下达到80.1% top1准确率，在移动设置上创造了新的ImageNet top1准确率SOTA。

items.capEn: Figure 10: OFA consistently outperforms MobileNetV3 on mobile platforms.
items.capZh: 图10：OFA在移动平台上始终优于MobileNetV3。

items.en: Besides the mobile platforms, we extensively studied the effectiveness of OFA on six additional hardware platforms (Figure 11) using the ProxylessNAS architecture space (Cai et al., 2019). OFA consistently improves the trade-off between accuracy and latency by a significant margin, especially on GPUs which have more parallelism. With similar latency as MobileNetV2 0.35, “OFA #25” improves the ImageNet top1 accuracy from MobileNetV2’s 60.3% to 72.6% (+12.3% improvement) on the 1080Ti GPU. Detailed architectures of our specialized models are shown in Figure 14. It reveals the insight that using the same model for different deployment scenarios with only the width multiplier modified has a limited impact on efficiency improvement: the accuracy drops quickly as the latency constraint gets tighter.
items.zh: 除了移动平台，我们还使用ProxylessNAS架构空间（Cai等人，2019）在六个额外的硬件平台上广泛研究了OFA的有效性（图11）。OFA始终显著改善准确性与延迟之间的权衡，尤其是在具有更多并行性的GPU上。在1080Ti GPU上，与MobileNetV2 0.35相似的延迟下，“OFA #25”将ImageNet top1准确率从MobileNetV2的60.3%提高到72.6%（+12.3%的提升）。我们专门模型的详细架构如图14所示。这揭示了一个见解：仅通过修改宽度乘数将相同模型用于不同部署场景对效率提升的影响有限：随着延迟约束变紧，准确性迅速下降。

items.capEn: Figure 11: Specialized OFA models consistently achieve significantly higher ImageNet accuracy with similar latency than non-specialized neural networks on CPU, GPU, mGPU, and FPGA. More remarkably, specializing for a new hardware platform does not add training cost using OFA.
items.capZh: 图11：专门的OFA模型在CPU、GPU、mGPU和FPGA上始终以相似的延迟实现显著更高的ImageNet准确性。更值得注意的是，使用OFA为新的硬件平台专门化不会增加训练成本。

items.capEn: Figure 12: OFA models improve the arithmetic intensity (OPS/Byte) and utilization (GOPS/s) compared with the MobileNetV2 and MnasNet (measured results on Xilinx ZU9EG and ZU3EG FPGA).
items.capZh: 图12：与MobileNetV2和MnasNet相比，OFA模型提高了算术强度（OPS/Byte）和利用率（GOPS/s）（在Xilinx ZU9EG和ZU3EG FPGA上的测量结果）。

items.en: There has been plenty of work on NAS for general-purpose hardware, but little work has been focused on specialized hardware accelerators. We quantitatively analyzed the performance of OFA on two FPGAs accelerators (ZU3EG and ZU9EG) using Xilinx Vitis AI with 8-bit quantization, and discuss two design principles.
items.zh: 已有大量关于通用硬件NAS的工作，但很少有工作专注于专用硬件加速器。我们定量分析了OFA在两个FPGA加速器（ZU3EG和ZU9EG）上使用Xilinx Vitis AI进行8位量化的性能，并讨论了两个设计原则。

items.en: Principle 1: memory access is expensive, computation is cheap. An efficient CNN should do as much as computation with a small amount of memory footprint. The ratio is defined as the arithmetic intensity (OPs/Byte). The higher OPs/Byte, the less memory bounded, the easier to parallelize. Thanks to OFA’s diverse choices of sub-network architectures (1019superscript101910^{19}) (Section 3.3), and the OFA model twin that can quickly give the accuracy/latency feedback (Section 3.4), the evolutionary search can automatically find a CNN architecture that has higher arithmetic intensity. As shown in Figure 12, OFA’s arithmetic intensity is 48%/43% higher than MobileNetV2 and MnasNet (MobileNetV3 is not supported by Xilinx Vitis AI). Removing the memory bottleneck results in higher utilization and GOPS/s by 70%-90%, pushing the operation point to the upper-right in the roofline model (Williams et al., 2009), as shown in Figure 13. (70%-90% looks small in the log scale but that is significant).
items.zh: 原则1：内存访问昂贵，计算便宜。高效的CNN应在少量内存占用下尽可能多地执行计算。该比率定义为算术强度（OPs/Byte）。OPs/Byte越高，内存受限越少，越容易并行化。得益于OFA多样化的子网络架构选择（10^19）（第3.3节），以及能快速给出准确性/延迟反馈的OFA模型孪生模型（第3.4节），进化搜索可以自动找到具有更高算术强度的CNN架构。如图12所示，OFA的算术强度比MobileNetV2和MnasNet高48%/43%（Xilinx Vitis AI不支持MobileNetV3）。消除内存瓶颈导致利用率和GOPS/s提高70%-90%，将操作点推向屋顶线模型（Williams等人，2009）的右上角，如图13所示。（70%-90%在对数尺度上看起来很小，但这是显著的。）

items.en: Principle 2: the CNN architecture should be co-designed with the hardware accelerator’s cost model. The FPGA accelerator has a specialized depth-wise engine that is pipelined with the point-wise engine. The pipeline throughput is perfectly matched for 3x3 kernels. As a result, OFA’s searched model only has 3x3 kernel (Figure 14, a) on FPGA, despite 5x5 and 7x7 kernels are also in the search space. Additionally, large kernels sometimes cause “out of BRAM” error on FPGA, giving high cost. On Intel Xeon CPU, however, more than 50% operations are large kernels. Both FPGA and GPU models are wider than CPU, due to the large parallelism of the computation array.
items.zh: 原则2：CNN架构应与硬件加速器的成本模型协同设计。FPGA加速器具有专门的深度方向引擎，与逐点引擎流水线化。流水线吞吐量完美匹配3x3卷积核。因此，OFA搜索到的模型在FPGA上仅使用3x3卷积核（图14，a），尽管搜索空间中也包含5x5和7x7卷积核。此外，大卷积核有时会在FPGA上导致“BRAM不足”错误，从而产生高成本。然而，在Intel Xeon CPU上，超过50%的操作是大卷积核。FPGA和GPU模型都比CPU模型更宽，这是由于计算阵列的大并行性。

items.capEn: Figure 13: Quantative study of OFA’s roofline model on Xilinx ZU9EG and ZU3EG FPGAs (log scale). OFA model increased the arithmetic intensity by 33%percent\%/43%percent\% and GOPS/s by 72%percent\%/92%percent\% on these two FPGAs compared with MnasNet.
items.capZh: 图13：在Xilinx ZU9EG和ZU3EG FPGA上对OFA屋顶线模型的定量研究（对数尺度）。与MnasNet相比，OFA模型在这两个FPGA上的算术强度分别提高了33%/43%，GOPS/s提高了72%/92%。

items.capEn: Figure 14: OFA can design specialized models for different hardware and different latency constraint. “MB4 3x3” means “mobile block with expansion ratio 4, kernel size 3x3”. FPGA and GPU models are wider than CPU model due to larger parallelism. Different hardware has different cost model, leading to different optimal CNN architectures. OFA provides a unified and efficient design methodology.
items.capZh: 图14：OFA可以为不同的硬件和不同的延迟约束设计专门的模型。“MB4 3x3”表示“扩展比为4、卷积核大小为3x3的移动块”。由于更大的并行性，FPGA和GPU模型比CPU模型更宽。不同的硬件具有不同的成本模型，导致不同的最优CNN架构。OFA提供了一种统一且高效的设计方法。

items.en: We proposed Once-for-All (OFA), a new methodology that decouples model training from architecture search for efficient deep learning deployment under a large number of hardware platforms. Unlike previous approaches that design and train a neural network for each deployment scenario, we designed a once-for-all network that supports different architectural configurations, including elastic depth, width, kernel size, and resolution. It reduces the training cost (GPU hours, energy consumption, and C​O2𝐶subscript𝑂2CO_{2} emission) by orders of magnitude compared to conventional methods. To prevent sub-networks of different sizes from interference, we proposed a progressive shrinking algorithm that enables a large number of sub-network to achieve the same level of accuracy compared to training them independently. Experiments on a diverse range of hardware platforms and efficiency constraints demonstrated the effectiveness of our approach. OFA provides an automated ecosystem to efficiently design efficient neural networks with the hardware cost model in the loop.
items.zh: 我们提出了Once-for-All（OFA），一种新的方法，将模型训练与架构搜索解耦，以便在大量硬件平台上高效部署深度学习。与以往为每个部署场景设计和训练神经网络的方法不同，我们设计了一个支持不同架构配置（包括弹性深度、宽度、卷积核大小和分辨率）的一次性网络。与传统方法相比，它将训练成本（GPU小时、能耗和CO2排放）降低了几个数量级。为了防止不同大小的子网络相互干扰，我们提出了一种渐进式收缩算法，使得大量子网络能够达到与独立训练相同的精度水平。在多种硬件平台和效率约束下的实验证明了我们方法的有效性。OFA提供了一个自动化生态系统，通过将硬件成本模型纳入循环，高效地设计高效的神经网络。

items.en: We thank NSF Career Award #1943349, MIT-IBM Watson AI Lab, Google-Daydream Research Award, Samsung, Intel, Xilinx, SONY, AWS Machine Learning Research Award for supporting this research. We thank Samsung, Google and LG for donating mobile phones. We thank Shuang Wu and Lei Deng for drawing the Figure 2.
items.zh: 我们感谢NSF职业奖#1943349、MIT-IBM Watson AI Lab、Google-Daydream研究奖、Samsung、Intel、Xilinx、SONY、AWS机器学习研究奖对本研究的支持。我们感谢Samsung、Google和LG捐赠手机。我们感谢Shuang Wu和Lei Deng绘制图2。
